doc: Voice patch for good-button.json (ADR-0032). One monophonic saw synth voice: a held freq drives the oscillator, a held gate the ADSR. NO filter here — the Good Button's brightness drives a single master filter on the summed mix (host post-mix), so the voice is just osc -> env VCA. The envelope ADSR rests at its operator defaults (per-voice params aren't host-addressable in the hosted-voice model). interface: freq/gate in, audio/active out.

nodes.doc: Saw tone (harmonics for the master filter to chew).
ADSR envelope (linear CV), gated by the voicer.
Shape the linear envelope CV into an exponential-style volume curve (x^2).
